{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185003336CCFFD62278F328AD5"}"},"total":191},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577810054081774360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错哈！真的不错！作者大大文笔非常好！和《名落孙山》作者文笔不相上下。有一点特别值得表扬，目前看来不啰嗦，剧情紧凑，情节精彩，是难得的科举文好文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764349923,"group_id":"7398111257225612312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天生我材必有用","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1C6MlRQMjfFvzll4L33UEk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/42abf4431fff453a9f67501e5cdcb8ba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789424&x-signature=wHzJzfKzwcOAMQBrnM4yt6FjOKU%3D","user_id":"111507822435","user_name":"@晨风1"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111507822435","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7398111257225612312","book_info":{"abstract":"一场车祸穿越农家两岁稚童，幸运的是这个家条件不错，没有什么狗屁倒灶的事情。孙定运靠着努力一步步科举，得中进士，原以为做个小官富贵一生，谁知卷入了夺嫡之中……               
主角没有金手指，没有过目不忘的本领，只是一个普通人，一步步的为自己谋划，往上爬的经历。写之前查阅了很多资料，我会尽可能的把古代那种百姓生活写出，难免会多些家长里短，请各位大佬见谅。
本书单女主，出场稍晚，感情方面会描写的稍微细腻，尽量写出古时候那种男主外、女主内的家庭氛围。主角小时候描写的容貌普通，是有原因的，后期主角男大十八变，容貌会出众一些，身形欣长有肉，大家放心！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2567c4c4f2b879e4e66b8fa3aac1097e","author":"李运子","author_id":"","book_id":"7398111257225612312","book_name":"科举，穿越人的逆袭之路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7398286616021697048","read_count":"33743","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1225327"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"595","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,单女主,架空,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6218ee53b5923197f8abe2366e732285~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447003&x-signature=Rw%2B%2Ftdh8TMzVhJt9X0GkmUrZ%2BlM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"992203754181323","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"91"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185003336CCFFD62278F328AD5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","scor
